title: Salt Air & Slow Days in Okinawa
description: Okinawa at sunset is almost too much — the sky goes orange, the sea turns gold, and everything below settles into silhouette. Time here doesn't pass so much as pool, warm and unhurried, like the air itself.
coverAlt: Golden sunset over the sea seen through tropical foliage in Okinawa

images.alt: Dramatic golden sunset over a coastal bay in Okinawa, framed by lush tropical trees
images.caption: Sunset over the sea — the kind of sky that stops you mid-sentence
